headline: 3 Reasons to Avoid BG and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Bunge Global’s 32.9% return over the past six months has outpaced the S&P 500 by 19.7%, and its stock price has climbed to $123.36 per share. This was partly due to its solid quarterly results, and the run-up might have investors contemplating their next move.
